expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Case focus coverage (advisory)”, it explicitly states: “Focus statement: ‘modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering.’” and further clarifies the needed differentiation: “differentiate: styling/indicators for cells with contextual links … styling/appearance for ordinary grid cells without contextual links.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The output does not provide a Phase 4a draft artifact and explicitly concludes it cannot verify alignment: “Determination: cannot be demonstrated from provided evidence (blocked)” and “does not include any run artifacts (no drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_*.md, no manifests…); Therefore we cannot verify: that Phase 4a produced a subcategory-only draft…”
